title: Arrow Trails
body:
![Arrow Trails logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/255518dd4cde9374f42134cf19e32f8fc821097f.png)
#
Arrow Trails is a client-side mod that adds, well, trails for arrows! Gradient line trails to be specific, not particle ones. Different arrows have different looking trails.

Everything can be configured ([MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) is recommended).

Also works in multiplayer, as expected, on vanilla servers too.

### ⚠ If the trails are invisible, toggle the "Deffered Rendering" option in the config!
#
![Many colored trails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a73cc44395d6190810b3a745ad639ea1c8fe443b_0.webp)
